现代游戏宅男秦泽意外身死穿越到一个架空王朝—梁朝。
成为梁朝景帝最“出名”的纨绔儿子，就在秦泽准备这辈子当个闲散王爷，啃父皇啃哥哥，富贵一生的时候，一块来自未来的屏幕打破了他的计划。
【扒一扒那些年“纨绔”皇子秦泽的骚操作】
【嘴炮气运之子和他的小护卫是怎么权倾朝野的】
……
随着天幕的讲述，那些文帝期间爆笑故事出现在众人眼前。
被大臣们盯着的秦泽，脚趾都能扣出个洞来。
大臣、景帝、皇子公主们：没想到你丫的是这么不靠谱啊。
左看看右看看不敢面对众人的秦泽挠挠头。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/bc610e270d21172ddb738224d8664d63","author":"赚钱的小咸鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"7349544941653068862","book_name":"收获二十八臣子的我成为千古一帝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7383242625823818265","read_count":"16588","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"722023"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"352","tags":"现言脑洞,现代言情,幻想言情,穿越,直播,无CP,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ec2952a4a9d1a79cbbd3d5f251ee1cff~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779451144&x-signature=IxvSoQ%2FjlX963hTKGmOogH78FUs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1495755379195175","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"78"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231959049B96F407E3CB80C27C66"}"},"relate_info_
